heading: Requirement of submission of application containing certain agreements and assurances
label: 300ee–13 Requirement of submission of application containing certain agreements and assurances

children.text: the State involved submits to the Secretary a description of the purposes for which the State intends to expend the payments for the fiscal year;
the description identifies the populations, areas, and localities in the State with a need for the services for which amounts may be provided by the State under this part;

the description provides information relating to the programs and activities to be supported and services to be provided, including a description of the manner in which such programs and activities will be coordinated with any similar programs and activities of public and private entities;
the State submits to the Secretary an application for the payments containing agreements in accordance with this part;
the agreements are made through certification from the chief executive officer of the State;
with respect to such agreements, the application provides assurances of compliance satisfactory to the Secretary; and
the application otherwise is in such form, is made in such manner, and contains such agreements, assurances, and information as the Secretary determines to be necessary to carry out this part.

children.heading: Opportunity for public comment
children.label: b Opportunity for public comment
children.text: The Secretary may not make payments under for a fiscal year unless the State involved agrees that, in developing and carrying out the description required in subsection (a), the State will provide public notice with respect to the description (including any revisions) and will facilitate comments from interested persons.section 300ee–11(a) of this title
